contexts.context: ...away the hourws, looking with contentment upon his <mark>flowers</mark> and his asparagus beds. This he ddie did,...
... Devoid of        <mark>flowers</mark> and family photographs, all is subordinate           here to...
...doleful in a perpetual pique. Fowls mope,<mark>flowers</mark> are wretched, the raspberry-canes are forced...
...your temper: let Youth pick a fruit or <mark>flower</mark>,out you would storm, arms whirling,screaming...
